items.title: Listen Without Judgment
items.advice: Allow children to express themselves freely before offering advice or correction.

items.title: Be Consistent
items.advice: Consistent rules and expectations help children feel secure.

items.title: Lead by Example
items.advice: Children often learn more from actions than words.

items.title: Spend Quality Time Together
items.advice: Regular shared activities strengthen emotional connections.

items.title: Encourage Independence
items.advice: Allow children to make age-appropriate decisions and learn from experiences.

items.title: Praise Effort
items.advice: Recognize hard work and persistence, not just achievements.

items.title: Create Open Communication
items.advice: Foster an environment where children feel safe discussing concerns.

items.title: Teach Responsibility
items.advice: Assign age-appropriate responsibilities to build confidence and accountability.

items.title: Show Unconditional Love
items.advice: Children thrive when they know they are valued regardless of mistakes.

items.title: Practice Patience
items.advice: Growth and learning take time; respond with understanding and guidance.
